cases.description: Text values and blank cells in the range are excluded from both the sum and the count, rather than being treated as 0
cases.expected_note: Only A1, A3, A5 (10, 20, 30) are numeric; average = 60/3 = 20. If blanks/text counted as 0 the result would be 12

cases.description: A range containing only text has zero numeric values to average -> #DIV/0!
A fully empty range also has zero numeric values -> #DIV/0!
